characters.name: Chika Akatsuki
characters.description: Akatsuki is a guy  with a gray hair and a brown eyes

characters.name: Kita Michiru
characters.description: No Title No information Kita Michiruis the main character of theZombie Loan series. Michiru was a pushover and was forced to give money to others. She eventually gets stronger with her friends. Michiru has been alone for years after her parents died in an accident and her father left her a large inherentance but couldn't get it if she isn't 18 years old. Abilities: Shinigami Eyes: This allows Michiru to sense the coming of death of a person in the form of a ring around the targets neck. When a person is marked to die, a gray ring appears, which darkens over time. Once the ring turns completely black, the person dies. Dimension Manipulation: Temporal Rewind:
